--- Main Page ---
Distillery of Modern Art
Skip to content
The Art
of the
Spirit
At Distillery of Modern Art (DoMA), we celebrate the Art of the Spirit, distilling craft spirits that inspire community and connect people to what they love. Pour yourself a glass of our amaro, gin, vodka, or whiskey, and you’ll notice that not only is the liquid inside the bottle exceptional, but each package features a unique print behind the label. The beauty and artistry in the label is a nod to the craft inside each bottle, and a reminder to make time for your own self-expression.
Seth Watson and Matt Greif
Founder and Head Distiller
DoMA Spirits
Shop now

--- Page: /pages/private-events ---
Private Events
– Distillery of Modern Art
Skip to content
Private Events
Elevate your private events with a touch of modern sophistication at Distillery of Modern Art, where contemporary spaces and artistic ambiance seamlessly blend to create unforgettable experiences.
Want to see how far your creativity can go? Check out some of
our favorite pictures
from past private events.
Compare these rooms side by side and discover all the amenities included in a DoMA rental
here
.
Private Event Rental Sheet
ROTHKO ROOM
Named after lauded American painter Mark Rothko, our event space is designed for all sorts of
large and lively receptions of 50-200 attendees
. Guests can take advantage of a dedicated entrance and a large pre-function space perfect for catering or cocktail tables.
Max capacity: 120 for a seated event, 150 for a mixture of seating and standing;
225 for standing
Sq. footage: 2,800
Pricing:
Sunday-Thursday: $3,500
Friday-Saturday: $4,500
WATSON GALLERY
Named after Distillery of Modern Art Founder Seth Watson, the Gallery is
ideal for small board meetings and private parties
. In addition to enjoying the featured art exhibition in the gallery, guests have access to a dedicated entry.
Max capacity: 35
Sq. footage: 861
Pricing:
Sunday-Thursday: $1,200
Friday-Saturday: $1,700
KANDINSKY TASTING ROOM
Named after abstract painter and art theorist Wassily Kandinsky, the Tasting Room is
perfect for medium sized gatherings such as a corporate happy hour or private party
. With our beautiful wrap around bar, dining seating, and views of our breathtaking copper stills, your guests will be able to grab a cocktail and get cozy.
Max capacity: 75
Sq. footage: 735
Pricing:
Sunday-Wednesday: $2,100*
Thursday: $3,100*
Friday-Saturday: $4,100*
*Pricing for exclusively serving Distillery of Modern Art spirits/cocktails. Clients can bring in outside alcohol for an additional $600.
I'm Becky Sowemimo, Director of Events at Distillery of Modern Art.
I approach my process the only way I know how, with constant communication, personable interactions, attention to detail, and a commitment to client satisfaction. Avoid the stress of figuring out what furniture goes where, guessing how many tables and chairs you need, how to project your curated playlist over the speakers, and so much more; our team will not only take the guesswork out of the event preparation process, but will also ensure that the stage is set for your big day.
Once you’ve secured our space, you can sit back, relax and get excited for fun details! Everything else will fall into place once you cross this big “to do” off your list.
Email Becky
If you would like to schedule your next event at Distillery of Modern Art, please fill out the form below.
